Deleted User 17-Oct-18 05:00 AM
Future Weekly Challenge Ideas: DO NOT DISTRIBUTE [500] Kill a KOS player on Constantiam [250] Earn 300 VoCoin™ from jobs [500] Build 3 VoCo Outposts within 50k of spawn in different quadrants [200] Build a VoCo symbol at 0, 0 in the overworld and nether [500] Build 3 Pig/Horse Outposts within 75k of spawn in different quadrants [300] Place 75 VoCo Ad Signs on major 2b2t highways [200] Build 2 VoCo Farms within 20k of spawn Phase V Challenge Idea: Rename as many Withers in spawn as possible to https://joinvo.co/ (edited)
The Vortex Coalition | 2b2t
The Vortex Coalition is the oldest active and largest group in 2b2t history with over 200 current members and hundreds of past members.

New Natural language processing Examples:
$natural in 10 minutes send Hello World! to #general
$natural at 18:00 send The big event has started!
$natural on the 16th of july at 14:00 send Subs reset today! to #subs
$natural now send 10 minutes has passed! every 10 minutes to #timer
Keywords: send : define the message every : define an interval to : define the location to send to Usage:

Deleted User 06-Dec-18 12:49 AM
template:
$natural on the [day] of [month] at 7pm send __**Week [#] Challenge:**__ [:vcn:vcn] [Challenge description] [extra details (dm to a creditor etc)] to #private_announcements
Bot uses Central Time, the date should always be on a Thursday, be sure to replace the week #, keep challenge description and extra details short, the entire message has to be less than 150 characters with the reminder bot, "to #member_announcements" tells the bot where to send the mesage. (edited)

Deleted User 06-Dec-18 05:41 PM
another one tonight @Deleted User, but the late one can be redeemed until saturday exactly a week after it was posted
so when we post late there is a bit of overlap where there are two available challenges at once, but that's ok and it gets us back on track
and it still leaves a full week for people to complete a challenge
Will people be allowed to redeem tasks for the two challenges at once?
and what will the task be for tonight?
yes, they can redeem two at once if there is overlap
they can only redeem challenges within the week that they are posted
